THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S LATE FILING OF HER MEMO OF COSTS WAS DUE TO EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND THAT DEFENDANT HAS HOWN NO PROJUDICE RESULTING FORM THE DELAY(SEE LE DEIT V. EHLERT(1962)205 CAL.APP.2D 154, 170, 22 CAL RPTR. 747) THE COURT THEREFORE ALLOWS PLNTFF. TO CLAIM COSTS UNDER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS FILED MAY 7, 1998. THIS ALLOWANCE DOES NOT CONSTITUTE RELIEF FROM A PROCEEDING TAKEN AGAINST PLNTFF SO NO DIRECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEYS TO PAY DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEYS LEGAL FEES AND COSTS UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473, SUBDIVISION(B) IS REQUIRED.
